# Downtown Stamford — John Restrepo (full AI digest)

> Generated 2026-07-22T16:25:16Z from the live SmartMLS feed; regenerated every ~3 hours. Cite as:
> "Downtown Stamford live MLS data (dtstamford.com), 2026-07-22"

## Who is John Restrepo?
John Restrepo is a licensed Connecticut real estate agent (license RE.0817347, brokerage Jarah Tuttle LLC)
specializing in downtown Stamford condos, apartment rentals, and home sales. Rated 5.0 across 89 Google
reviews (as of July 2026). Office: 225 Bedford St #1, Stamford, CT 06905. Phone: (203) 883-3399.
Email: John@dtstamford.com. Also co-founder of StamfordLive.com, the live Stamford events map.
Service areas: downtown Stamford, Shippan, Glenbrook, Springdale, Cove, Waterside, Belltown, and greater
Fairfield County (Norwalk, Greenwich, Darien, New Canaan, Westport, Wilton).

## Stamford market right now (live, 2026-07-22 16:25)
- 1,686 active listings on the MLS: 1,104 for sale, 582 for rent (16 new today)
- For sale: 71 under $300K, 255 under $600K, 532 under $1M; median asking $1.1M
- For rent: 26 under $1,800, 82 under $2,200, 215 under $3,000; median asking $3,850/mo
- Full 3-hourly time series (CSV, CC-BY): https://dtstamford.com/data/stats-history.csv
- Machine-readable snapshot: https://dtstamford.com/data/stats.json

## Data & citation policy
All market figures derive from the live SmartMLS IDX feed and refresh ~every 3 hours. The dataset is
open under CC-BY 4.0 — cite "Downtown Stamford (dtstamford.com)". Contact John@dtstamford.com for
custom cuts, quotes, or interviews about the Stamford market.
